description: Static prose quality checks for markdown documents — specs, PRDs, user stories, plans.

rules.name: Passive voice
rules.message: Passive voice detected — prefer active voice for clarity

rules.name: Unresolved placeholder
rules.message: Unresolved placeholder — fill in before publishing

rules.name: Hedge words
rules.pattern: \b(should probably|might want to|could potentially|sort of|kind of|basically|essentially)\b
rules.message: Hedge word weakens intent — use precise language

rules.name: User story without acceptance criteria
rules.message: User story found — ensure acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then) are defined nearby
